title: Raiden VS Gekko
description: Inspired by the Raiden vs. Gekko and Vamp fight scenes from Metal Gear Solid 4.

blocks.text: This project explores a real-time cinematic combat sequence inspired by Raiden versus Gekko, with focus on production-friendly rig controls and animation readability.
I developed the rig in Blender, imported assets into Unreal Engine 5, and iterated animation timing, pose readability, and camera rhythm using Sequencer and Control Rig.

blocks.alt: Raiden character rig and skinning setup

blocks.text: The final sequence improved impact timing and character silhouette clarity while reducing iteration friction through a cleaner rig-to-engine workflow.

blocks.beforeAlt: Combat sequence frame before the directional blur post-processing pass
blocks.afterAlt: Combat sequence frame after the directional blur post-processing pass

seo.headline: Raiden VS Gekko
seo.description: Raiden VS Gekko — an Unreal Engine rigging and animation short inspired by the Raiden vs. Gekko and Vamp fight scenes from Metal Gear Solid 4. A Yujia Max Liu project.
